name: S3
description: S3-compatible object storage: upload, download, delete, presign, list

skills.name: Put Object
skills.description: Upload an object to an S3 bucket

skills.name: Get Object
skills.description: Download an object from an S3 bucket

skills.name: Delete Object
skills.description: Delete an object from an S3 bucket

skills.name: Presign URL
skills.description: Generate a presigned URL for temporary access to an object

skills.name: List Objects
skills.description: List objects in an S3 bucket with optional prefix filter
